title: 『ウグイス、ホトトギスにならず』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky has invited Sakura Chiyono O to run
in a scrimmage with her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined not to lose to her role model, Sakura
Chiyono O begins doing research on
Maruzensky's races, but a few blunt words from
Mr. C.B plant a seed of doubt in her heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And once their race begins, that seed of doubt
sprouts into a certainty—Maruzensky has never
once felt desperation in a race... including theirs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O then realizes that Maruzensky
doesn't see her as a rival, which greatly upsets
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She swears to light a fire in Maruzensky's heart by
taking on senior racers in the autumn Tenno Sho.
